desc:
f14v 特征描述

茎与花：多分枝主茎。顶端和侧枝长有浅棕色、杯状的小花簇。
叶片：极小且密集。呈“V”字形排列，颜色为红绿相间，布满整个茎秆。
根部：放射状须根。中心向四周延伸出多条纤细、弯曲的根须。

Stem & Flowers: Multi-branched main stem. Small clusters of light brown, cup-shaped flowers at the tips and side branches.
Leaves: Extremely small and dense. Arranged in a "V" shape, alternating between red and green, covering the entire stem.
Roots: Radiant fibrous roots. Multiple thin, curved rootlets extending outward from the center.
